WindowsAudioWrapper
Table of Contents

Namespace WindowsAudioWrapper.Models

Classes

AudioDeviceEventArgs

Provides event data for Windows audio endpoint connection arrivals and hardware state changes.

AudioEndpointCapabilities
AudioEndpointInfo

Contains detailed information and current state for a specific Windows audio endpoint.

AudioEndpointReference

Acts as a data-contract wrapper tracking hardware location properties used to resolve targets.

AudioEndpointVisibility

Captures the persisted visibility state for a Windows audio endpoint.

AudioEnhancementProfile
AudioFormatProfile

Represents the default format of the audio stream for a given endpoint.

AudioOperationMessage

Represents a message generated during validation or application of an audio profile.

AudioProfile

The only profile/state object used by WindowsAudioWrapper. A profile may be created by a user, saved in JSON, or captured from the current Windows audio state.

AudioProfileApplyResult

Represents the result of an attempt to apply an audio profile to the system.

AudioProfileValidationResult

Represents the result of validating an AudioProfile before application.

HardwareDetails

Contains extended, low-level unmanaged property telemetry mapping for hardware endpoints. Strictly respects zero-null constraints for integration stability.

PlaybackAudioProfile

Holds configuration targets and settings for system audio playback devices.

RecordingAudioProfile

Holds configuration targets and settings for system audio recording devices.

SystemAudioProfile

Represents global system audio settings that apply across all devices.

Enums

AudioDeviceState
AudioFlow
AudioFormatMode
AudioMessageCode
AudioMessageSeverity
AudioSampleFormat
AudioValidationSeverity
Made with docfx
